title: Transactional Outbox, Relay, Inbox, Sagas, and Compensation · Mastery Check
summary: A production review compares near-miss TypeScript messaging decisions for transactional outbox, relay, inbox, sagas, and compensation and requires the smallest defensible outbox, relay, inbox, and compensation protocol with changed-case evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for outbox, relay, inbox, and compensation protocol. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enumerate database-first, publish-first, timeout, crash, confirm-loss, rollback, and duplicate failure windows for a dual write.
Store domain mutation and immutable outbox message identity, type, payload, destination intent, and availability atomically.
Claim bounded outbox rows, publish with backpressure and confirms, mark completion safely, and recover ambiguous attempts through stable identity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Dual Write Failure Matrix
steps.instruction:
Order the Dual Write Failure Matrix RabbitMQ and TypeScript messaging evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Dual Write Failure Matrix.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Dual Write Failure Matrix assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Dual Write Failure Matrix, keep Dual Write Failure Matrix connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A quiz messaging team handles case 7802 in a canary consumer reading old and new envelope versions. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to close the local dual-write gap and preserve confirm or external-effect ambiguity; separate browser evidence from disposable live-broker proof; then reuse one message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Enumerate database-first, publish-first, timeout, crash, confirm-loss, rollback, and duplicate failure windows for a dual write.

content.text: Order work so Dual Write Failure Matrix has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
